# Web Application Interface

::: {.callout-note}
## Work in Progress
This page is a placeholder. Content will be added to explain the webapp UI.
:::

## Overview

This page will provide a detailed walkthrough of the MolViewStories web application interface.

## Planned Content

### Main Interface Areas
- **Story Panel** (left side) - Managing story metadata and scenes
- **Code Editor** (center) - Writing MolViewSpec code
- **3D Viewer** (right side) - Interactive molecular visualization
- **Top Menu Bar** - Story operations, settings, and user actions

### Story Panel
- Story metadata editor
- Scene list and navigation
- Scene options and settings
- Assets management

### Code Editor Features
- Syntax highlighting
- Auto-completion
- Code execution (Ctrl/Cmd+S)
- Error highlighting

### 3D Viewer Controls
- Mouse navigation
- Camera controls
- Scene preview
- Focus and zoom tools

### Top Menu Bar
- Story operations (New, Save, Export, Publish)
- User menu (Login, My Stories, Logout)
- Settings and preferences
- Help and documentation links

## Screenshots

*Screenshots of the interface will be added here*

## Next Steps

Once you're familiar with the interface, learn about:
- [Building Stories](core-features.qmd) - Creating your first story
- [Tips & Workflows](tips-shortcuts.qmd) - Efficient workflows
